title: Jetking Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jetking Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Jetking Ventures Solutions in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jetking Ventures Solutions:
Jetking Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking Ventures Solutions!
